content: NP algorithm: 30-second rolling average → 4th power → mean → 4th root. Zeros must be INCLUDED (not excluded) — excluding zeros inflates average power and produces lower-than-real NP. Power spikes/dropouts (e.g. 1500W sensor glitch) corrupt NP catastrophically. TSS uses NP not avg power: TSS = (duration_s × NP × IF) / (FTP × 3600) × 100. Using avg power instead of NP understates TSS by 10-25% on variable rides.
